requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances (RoHS-equivalent) — No EU-style Horizontal Regime in Botswana
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质（RoHS 等效）——博茨瓦纳无欧盟式横向制度
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質（RoHS 等效）——波札那無歐盟式橫向制度

summary.en: Botswana does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime (i.e., there is no Botswana equivalent of Directive 2011/65/EU restricting Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE, and the four phthalates as a precondition of market placement for electrical and electronic equipment generally). There is no general Botswana legal requirement to test LED luminaires against a 10-substance restricted list or to issue a RoHS Declaration of Conformity. Substance-related obligations, where they exist, arise from general chemical/hazardous-substance and environmental controls and from any product-specific BOS standard requirements adopted by BOBS, not from a dedicated electrical-product RoHS instrument. This is stated plainly: a Chinese exporter should not assume a Botswana RoHS obligation, but should confirm with BOBS whether any substance limits apply via the specific adopted BOS/IEC product standard, and check general environmental/chemical import controls.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳没有欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度（即不存在相当于指令 2011/65/EU 的博茨瓦纳制度，将铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 及四项邻苯二甲酸酯作为电气电子设备一般市场准入前提加以限制）。博茨瓦纳无要求 LED 灯具对照 10 项限制物质清单检测或出具 RoHS 符合性声明的普遍法律要求。与物质相关的义务（如存在）来自一般化学品/有害物质及环境管控，以及 BOBS 采纳的任何产品专有 BOS 标准要求，而非专门的电气产品 RoHS 制度。明确说明：中国出口商不应假定存在博茨瓦纳 RoHS 义务，但应向 BOBS 确认是否经具体采纳的 BOS/IEC 产品标准适用任何物质限值，并核查一般环境/化学品进口管控。
summary.zht: 波札那沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度（即不存在相當於指令 2011/65/EU 的波札那制度，將鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 及四項鄰苯二甲酸酯作為電氣電子設備一般市場准入前提加以限制）。波札那無要求 LED 燈具對照 10 項限制物質清單檢測或出具 RoHS 符合性聲明的普遍法律要求。與物質相關的義務（如存在）來自一般化學品/有害物質及環境管控，以及 BOBS 採納的任何產品專有 BOS 標準要求，而非專門的電氣產品 RoHS 制度。明確說明：中國出口商不應假定存在波札那 RoHS 義務，但應向 BOBS 確認是否經具體採納的 BOS/IEC 產品標準適用任何物質限值，並核查一般環境/化學品進口管控。

standards_or_laws: No Botswana equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU （RoHS 2） as a horizontal market-entry restriction for EEE
Any substance limits arise from general chemical/environmental controls or specific adopted BOS/IEC product standards — confirm with BOBS

summary.en: China operates China RoHS: GB/T 26572-2011 (concentration limits for restricted substances in EEE) covers the original 6 substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with the same thresholds as EU RoHS, and SJ/T 11364-2014 requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange/green) on EEE sold in China. China RoHS is primarily a disclosure-and-labelling regime rather than a market-entry restriction, and as of 2026 the four EU phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) are not in the CN mandatory restricted list.
summary.zh: 中国实施中国 RoHS：GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求）涵盖原 6 项物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同；SJ/T 11364-2014 要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙/绿）。中国 RoHS 主要为披露与标识制度而非市场准入限制，截至 2026 年，欧盟四项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）未纳入中国强制限制清单。
summary.zht: 中國實施中國 RoHS：GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求）涵蓋原 6 項物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同；SJ/T 11364-2014 要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙/綠）。中國 RoHS 主要為披露與標識制度而非市場准入限制，截至 2026 年，歐盟四項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）未納入中國強制限制清單。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE （covers original 6 substances）
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for restricted use of hazardous substances in EEE （China RoHS disclosure label）

gap.en: Here the comparison is honest and asymmetric: the EU has a binding horizontal RoHS market-entry restriction (10 substances), China has a disclosure-oriented China RoHS (6 substances + label), and Botswana has NO EU-style horizontal RoHS at all. For a Chinese exporter to Botswana this means: (1) there is no Botswana RoHS Declaration of Conformity to prepare and no mandated 10-substance test as a general precondition; (2) the China RoHS disclosure label (SJ/T 11364) is a Chinese requirement and is neither required nor recognised in Botswana; (3) however, do not treat this as 'no chemical obligations' — general Botswana environmental and hazardous-substance controls, and any substance requirements embedded in a specific adopted BOS/IEC product standard, may still apply, so confirm with BOBS and the relevant environmental authority. The practical effect is a lighter substance-compliance burden than EU export, but it must be verified, not assumed.
gap.zh: 此处对照是诚实且不对称的：欧盟有约束性横向 RoHS 市场准入限制（10 项物质），中国有偏披露的中国 RoHS（6 项物质 + 标识），而博茨瓦纳完全没有欧盟式横向 RoHS。对中国出口商而言：（1）无需准备博茨瓦纳 RoHS 符合性声明，无作为一般前提的强制 10 项物质检测；（2）中国 RoHS 披露标识（SJ/T 11364）属中国要求，在博茨瓦纳既非必需亦不被认可；（3）但不应视为「无化学品义务」——博茨瓦纳一般环境及有害物质管控，以及具体采纳的 BOS/IEC 产品标准中嵌入的任何物质要求，仍可能适用，故请向 BOBS 及相关环境主管机构确认。实际效果是物质合规负担轻于出口欧盟，但须核实而非假定。
gap.zht: 此處對照是誠實且不對稱的：歐盟有約束性橫向 RoHS 市場准入限制（10 項物質），中國有偏披露的中國 RoHS（6 項物質 + 標識），而波札那完全沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS。對中國出口商而言：（1）無需準備波札那 RoHS 符合性聲明，無作為一般前提的強制 10 項物質檢測；（2）中國 RoHS 披露標識（SJ/T 11364）屬中國要求，在波札那既非必需亦不被認可；（3）但不應視為「無化學品義務」——波札那一般環境及有害物質管控，以及具體採納的 BOS/IEC 產品標準中嵌入的任何物質要求，仍可能適用，故請向 BOBS 及相關環境主管機構確認。實際效果是物質合規負擔輕於出口歐盟，但須核實而非假定。

mandatory_status.target: Not required （no horizontal regime） — Botswana has no EU-style RoHS market-entry restriction or RoHS DoC requirement for EEE; verify any substance limits via specific adopted BOS/IEC standards and general environmental controls with BOBS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory （disclosure） — China RoHS disclosure label required under SJ/T 11364; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not in CN mandatory list as of 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Botswana has no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime — there is no mandated 10-substance restriction, no RoHS Declaration of Conformity, and the China RoHS disclosure label is neither required nor recognised. This is a genuinely lighter substance-compliance position than EU export. However, general environmental/hazardous-substance controls and any substance requirements within a specific adopted BOS/IEC product standard may still apply, so confirm with BOBS and the relevant Botswana authority rather than assuming zero obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 博茨瓦纳无欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度——无强制 10 项物质限制、无 RoHS 符合性声明，中国 RoHS 披露标识既非必需亦不被认可。这确实是比出口欧盟更轻的物质合规处境。但一般环境/有害物质管控及具体采纳的 BOS/IEC 产品标准中的任何物质要求仍可能适用，故请向 BOBS 及博茨瓦纳相关主管机构确认，而非假定零义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波札那無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度——無強制 10 項物質限制、無 RoHS 符合性聲明，中國 RoHS 披露標識既非必需亦不被認可。這確實是比出口歐盟更輕的物質合規處境。但一般環境/有害物質管控及具體採納的 BOS/IEC 產品標準中的任何物質要求仍可能適用，故請向 BOBS 及波札那相關主管機構確認，而非假定零義務。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical / SVHC Supply-Chain Notification — No REACH-equivalent in Botswana
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品 / SVHC 供应链通报——博茨瓦纳无 REACH 对应制度
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品 / SVHC 供應鏈通報——波札那無 REACH 對應制度

summary.en: Botswana has NO equivalent of the EU REACH Regulation (EC) 1907/2006 Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification duty and no ECHA-style Candidate List or SCIP database. There is no Botswana obligation for an LED-luminaire supplier to proactively notify business customers, or respond to consumers, when an article contains a Substance of Very High Concern above 0.1% w/w. Chemical management in Botswana is addressed through general national chemical, environmental, and hazardous-substance controls rather than a REACH-style articles-in-products notification framework. A Chinese exporter therefore has no Botswana SVHC-notification process to maintain; any chemical-control obligations would stem from general import/environmental rules, which should be confirmed with the relevant Botswana authority.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳没有相当于欧盟 REACH 法规（EC）1907/2006 第 33 条 SVHC 供应链通报义务的制度，亦无 ECHA 式候选清单或 SCIP 数据库。当物品中高度关注物质浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）时，博茨瓦纳不要求 LED 灯具供应商主动通报商业客户或回应消费者。博茨瓦纳的化学品管理通过一般国家化学品、环境及有害物质管控处理，而非 REACH 式产品中物品通报框架。因此中国出口商无需维护博茨瓦纳 SVHC 通报流程；任何化学品管控义务将来自一般进口/环境规则，应向博茨瓦纳相关主管机构确认。
summary.zht: 波札那沒有相當於歐盟 REACH 法規（EC）1907/2006 第 33 條 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務的制度，亦無 ECHA 式候選清單或 SCIP 數據庫。當物品中高度關注物質濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）時，波札那不要求 LED 燈具供應商主動通報商業客戶或回應消費者。波札那的化學品管理透過一般國家化學品、環境及有害物質管控處理，而非 REACH 式產品中物品通報框架。因此中國出口商無需維護波札那 SVHC 通報流程；任何化學品管控義務將來自一般進口/環境規則，應向波札那相關主管機構確認。

standards_or_laws: No Botswana equivalent to EU REACH （EC） 1907/2006 Article 33 SVHC notification, ECHA Candidate List, or SCIP database
Chemical management via general Botswana national chemical/environmental/hazardous-substance controls

summary.en: China also has no direct equivalent to REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC supply-chain notification. The closest CN instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (2020) on new chemical substance environmental management registration and GB 30981-2020 (classification and labelling of chemicals) for hazardous chemicals — none of which create a duty to proactively notify B2B customers when an SVHC is present in an article above 0.1% w/w.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH 第 33 条物品级 SVHC 供应链通报的制度。最接近的中国工具为生态环境部令第 12 号（2020 年）关于新化学物质环境管理登记及 GB 30981-2020（化学品分类和标签）针对危险化学品——均未产生在物品中 SVHC 浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户的义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH 第 33 條物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報的制度。最接近的中國工具為生態環境部令第 12 號（2020 年）關於新化學物質環境管理登記及 GB 30981-2020（化學品分類和標籤）針對危險化學品——均未產生在物品中 SVHC 濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶的義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 （2020） — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances （China）
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals （China）

gap.en: On article-level SVHC supply-chain notification, Botswana and China are aligned in the same way: NEITHER has a REACH-style obligation, so this is the EU being the outlier. For a Chinese exporter to Botswana there is effectively no gap to close on this specific point — there is no Botswana SVHC-notification process, ECHA Candidate List tracking duty, or SCIP database registration. The honest caveat is that 'no SVHC notification regime' does not mean 'no chemical rules': general Botswana environmental and hazardous-substance import controls still apply and should be confirmed. This row is included to record plainly that the EU REACH Article 33 obligation has no Botswana counterpart, so exporters should not import EU-driven SVHC compliance expectations into the Botswana route.
gap.zh: 在物品级 SVHC 供应链通报方面，博茨瓦纳与中国以相同方式一致：两者均无 REACH 式义务，故欧盟为例外。对中国出口商而言，这一具体点实际上无差距需弥合——无博茨瓦纳 SVHC 通报流程、ECHA 候选清单跟踪义务或 SCIP 数据库注册。诚实的提醒是「无 SVHC 通报制度」不等于「无化学品规则」：博茨瓦纳一般环境及有害物质进口管控仍适用并应予确认。本行旨在如实记录：欧盟 REACH 第 33 条义务在博茨瓦纳无对应要求，故出口商不应将欧盟驱动的 SVHC 合规预期带入博茨瓦纳路径。
gap.zht: 在物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報方面，波札那與中國以相同方式一致：兩者均無 REACH 式義務，故歐盟為例外。對中國出口商而言，這一具體點實際上無差距需彌合——無波札那 SVHC 通報流程、ECHA 候選清單跟蹤義務或 SCIP 數據庫注冊。誠實的提醒是「無 SVHC 通報制度」不等於「無化學品規則」：波札那一般環境及有害物質進口管控仍適用並應予確認。本行旨在如實記錄：歐盟 REACH 第 33 條義務在波札那無對應要求，故出口商不應將歐盟驅動的 SVHC 合規預期帶入波札那路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Not required （no equivalent） — Botswana has no REACH Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification, no ECHA Candidate List tracking duty, and no SCIP-style database. General chemical/environmental import controls may still apply
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China also has no article-level SVHC supply-chain notification obligation equivalent to REACH Article 33 as of 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Botswana has no REACH-equivalent SVHC supply-chain notification regime, no ECHA Candidate List tracking duty, and no SCIP database — on this point Botswana and China are aligned and the EU is the outlier. A Chinese exporter has no Botswana SVHC-notification process to maintain. The honest caveat: general Botswana environmental and hazardous-substance import controls still apply and should be confirmed with the relevant authority; 'no REACH equivalent' is not 'no chemical rules'.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 博茨瓦纳无 REACH 对应的 SVHC 供应链通报制度、无 ECHA 候选清单跟踪义务、无 SCIP 数据库——在这一点上博茨瓦纳与中国一致，欧盟为例外。中国出口商无需维护博茨瓦纳 SVHC 通报流程。诚实提醒：博茨瓦纳一般环境及有害物质进口管控仍适用并应向相关主管机构确认；「无 REACH 对应」不等于「无化学品规则」。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波札那無 REACH 對應的 SVHC 供應鏈通報制度、無 ECHA 候選清單跟蹤義務、無 SCIP 數據庫——在這一點上波札那與中國一致，歐盟為例外。中國出口商無需維護波札那 SVHC 通報流程。誠實提醒：波札那一般環境及有害物質進口管控仍適用並應向相關主管機構確認；「無 REACH 對應」不等於「無化學品規則」。

requirement_topic.en: Conformity Route & Market-Access Process — BOBS Conformity / Import Inspection vs CCC
requirement_topic.zh: 合格评定路径与市场准入流程——BOBS 合格评定/进口检验 vs CCC
requirement_topic.zht: 合格評定路徑與市場准入流程——BOBS 合格評定/進口檢驗 vs CCC

summary.en: Market access for regulated LED luminaires in Botswana is delivered through BOBS conformity assessment and BOS import inspection rather than CE-style self-declaration or a horizontal directive package. Typical steps: (1) determine whether the product is a regulated/controlled product subject to mandatory BOBS conformity assessment or import inspection; (2) demonstrate conformity to the applicable BOS standards (which adopt IEC, often via SANS) for safety, and EMC where in scope, using test reports from a laboratory acceptable to BOBS (ILAC MRA-recognised); (3) obtain the relevant BOBS conformity authorisation / BOS mark or clear destination/pre-shipment inspection; (4) appoint an in-country importer of record; (5) for wireless products, obtain BOCRA radio approval separately; (6) plan landlocked logistics via Durban or Walvis Bay. There is no single combined Declaration of Conformity covering a multi-directive package as in the EU — the route is conformity-assessment/inspection-led.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳受管制 LED 灯具的市场准入通过 BOBS 合格评定及 BOS 进口检验实现，而非 CE 式自我声明或横向指令组合。典型步骤：（1）判定产品是否为须强制 BOBS 合格评定或进口检验的受管制/受控产品；（2）使用 BOBS 可接受实验室（ILAC MRA 认可）的检测报告，对适用 BOS 标准（采纳 IEC，常经 SANS）证明安全符合性，并在范围内证明 EMC；（3）取得相关 BOBS 合格授权/BOS 标志或通过目的地/装运前检验；（4）委任在地进口记录人；（5）无线产品另取得 BOCRA 无线电核准；（6）经德班或沃尔维斯湾规划内陆物流。不存在欧盟那样涵盖多指令组合的单一合并符合性声明——该路径以合格评定/检验为主导。
summary.zht: 波札那受管制 LED 燈具的市場准入透過 BOBS 合格評定及 BOS 進口檢驗實現，而非 CE 式自我聲明或橫向指令組合。典型步驟：（1）判定產品是否為須強制 BOBS 合格評定或進口檢驗的受管制/受控產品；（2）使用 BOBS 可接受實驗室（ILAC MRA 認可）的檢測報告，對適用 BOS 標準（採納 IEC，常經 SANS）證明安全符合性，並在範圍內證明 EMC；（3）取得相關 BOBS 合格授權/BOS 標誌或通過目的地/裝運前檢驗；（4）委任在地進口記錄人；（5）無線產品另取得 BOCRA 無線電核准；（6）經德班或沃爾維斯灣規劃內陸物流。不存在歐盟那樣涵蓋多指令組合的單一合並符合性聲明——該路徑以合格評定/檢驗為主導。

standards_or_laws: BOBS conformity assessment / BOS import inspection for regulated lighting products （IEC/SANS-based BOS standards）
BOCRA radio approval （wireless）; in-country importer of record; landlocked routing via Durban / Walvis Bay

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory market-access mechanism for in-scope luminaires is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA, requiring third-party certification by a CNCA-authorised body (e.g., CQC) with testing at authorised laboratories. Wireless luminaires additionally need SRRC type approval. CCC is a domestic third-party certification regime; CCC certificates and SRRC approvals are issued for the Chinese route and are not recognised by BOBS or BOCRA.
summary.zh: 在中国，范围内灯具的主要强制市场准入机制为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 主管，须由 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）进行第三方认证，并在授权实验室检测。无线灯具还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 为国内第三方认证制度；CCC 证书及 SRRC 核准是为中国路径出具的，不被 BOBS 或 BOCRA 认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，範圍內燈具的主要強制市場准入機制為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 主管，須由 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）進行第三方認證，並在授權實驗室檢測。無線燈具還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 為國內第三方認證制度；CCC 證書及 SRRC 核准是為中國路徑出具的，不被 BOBS 或 BOCRA 認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires （CNCA/CQC）
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: Both Botswana (BOBS conformity/inspection) and China (CCC) use a conformity-assessment-led, often third-party route — so structurally Botswana is closer to China's CCC model than to the EU's self-declaration. But the regimes are non-mutual: a CCC certificate does not clear BOBS, and SRRC does not satisfy BOCRA. Key Botswana-specific differences from the China process: (1) test reports must be from a laboratory acceptable to BOBS (ILAC MRA-recognised), and Chinese CCC reports are not automatically transferable; (2) an in-country importer of record is typically required (vs. domestic flow in China); (3) landlocked logistics via Durban or Walvis Bay; (4) ratings for the 230 V / 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V); (5) wireless radio approval is BOCRA, not SRRC. Confirm the exact regulated-product scope, applicable BOS/SANS references, and whether assessment is pre-market certification or import inspection directly with BOBS.
gap.zh: 博茨瓦纳（BOBS 合格评定/检验）与中国（CCC）均采用以合格评定为主导、常为第三方的路径——故结构上博茨瓦纳更接近中国 CCC 模式而非欧盟自我声明。但两套制度不互认：CCC 证书不可放行 BOBS，SRRC 不满足 BOCRA。博茨瓦纳相对中国流程的关键差异：（1）检测报告须来自 BOBS 可接受实验室（ILAC MRA 认可），中国 CCC 报告不可自动转用；（2）通常须有在地进口记录人（中国为国内流程）；（3）经德班或沃尔维斯湾的内陆物流；（4）按 230 V / 50 Hz 电网设计（50 Hz 与中国相同；标称电压不同于中国 220/380 V）；（5）无线电核准为 BOCRA 而非 SRRC。请直接向 BOBS 确认具体受管制产品范围、适用 BOS/SANS 引用，以及评估属上市前认证还是进口检验。
gap.zht: 波札那（BOBS 合格評定/檢驗）與中國（CCC）均採用以合格評定為主導、常為第三方的路徑——故結構上波札那更接近中國 CCC 模式而非歐盟自我聲明。但兩套制度不互認：CCC 證書不可放行 BOBS，SRRC 不滿足 BOCRA。波札那相對中國流程的關鍵差異：（1）檢測報告須來自 BOBS 可接受實驗室（ILAC MRA 認可），中國 CCC 報告不可自動轉用；（2）通常須有在地進口記錄人（中國為國內流程）；（3）經德班或沃爾維斯灣的內陸物流；（4）按 230 V / 50 Hz 電網設計（50 Hz 與中國相同；標稱電壓不同於中國 220/380 V）；（5）無線電核准為 BOCRA 而非 SRRC。請直接向 BOBS 確認具體受管制產品範圍、適用 BOS/SANS 引用，以及評估屬上市前認證還是進口檢驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — BOBS conformity assessment / BOS import inspection required for regulated lighting products before Botswana market placement; in-country importer of record typically required; BOCRA approval for wireless
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Botswana market access for regulated LED luminaires runs through BOBS conformity assessment / BOS import inspection (against IEC/SANS-based BOS standards), structurally closer to China's CCC than to EU self-declaration — but non-mutual: CCC does not clear BOBS and SRRC does not satisfy BOCRA. Use test reports from a BOBS-acceptable ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory, appoint an in-country importer of record, rate for 230 V / 50 Hz, plan landlocked logistics via Durban or Walvis Bay, and obtain BOCRA approval for wireless products. Confirm regulated-product scope and the exact BOS/SANS references with BOBS.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 博茨瓦纳受管制 LED 灯具市场准入通过 BOBS 合格评定/BOS 进口检验（依据基于 IEC/SANS 的 BOS 标准），结构上更接近中国 CCC 而非欧盟自我声明——但不互认：CCC 不可放行 BOBS，SRRC 不满足 BOCRA。请使用 BOBS 可接受的 ILAC MRA 认可实验室检测报告，委任在地进口记录人，按 230 V / 50 Hz 设计，经德班或沃尔维斯湾规划内陆物流，并为无线产品取得 BOCRA 核准。请向 BOBS 确认受管制产品范围及具体 BOS/SANS 引用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波札那受管制 LED 燈具市場准入透過 BOBS 合格評定/BOS 進口檢驗（依據基於 IEC/SANS 的 BOS 標準），結構上更接近中國 CCC 而非歐盟自我聲明——但不互認：CCC 不可放行 BOBS，SRRC 不滿足 BOCRA。請使用 BOBS 可接受的 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室檢測報告，委任在地進口記錄人，按 230 V / 50 Hz 設計，經德班或沃爾維斯灣規劃內陸物流，並為無線產品取得 BOCRA 核准。請向 BOBS 確認受管制產品範圍及具體 BOS/SANS 引用。
